name: Hairy Man
description: Appears mostly in woodland or rural settings. Hair is thick and profusive. Humanlike digitation. Has no digestive system and regurgitates the hair and bones of prey, uses pharyngeal jaw to eat. Capable of mimicking human speech.
behavior: Follows at a distance, prefers to pick off lone prey. Hunts, mutilates, and masticates wildlife or livestock and regurgitates the remnants.

specials.name: Ambush
specials.desc: As a tension move, the Admin may inform the exorcists they are being stalked. If nothing is done to mitigate this, any time they get into a conflict scene for the rest of the mission there's a 50% chance (roll 1d6: 1-3) a Hairy Man will attack and try to drag one of them off.

name: Skin Light
description: Multicolored bubble, lit from an unseen light. On close inspection, they are made of transparent, softly breathing skin. Reproduce via a grisly process. Appear to lack sapience.
behavior: Appears only at night. Floats in place. Attracted to the heat generated by living beings and attempts to fuse with them.

specials.name: Fuse
specials.desc: As a threat or on a '1' reaction roll the Skin Light can fuse to an exorcist with exposed skin. This kills the drifter but gives the Exorcist the Fuse hook (0/3). Skin bubbles and blisters, radiate colors. -1D to use tools or weapons while you have the hook. If filled, suffer 2d6 stress as skin rips away forming a new Skin Light.

name: Spindley (Road Wraith)
description: Also known as the 'Road wraith'. Appears in areas with high occurrences of car accidents and road related injuries. Often responsible for motorist disappearances and uses its high sprinting speed to follow cars for miles.
behavior: Only found alone, pacing up and down a road at night or underground. Extremely aggressive once encountered but rarely leaves roads.

specials.name: Road Killer
specials.desc: While standing on a road, deals +2 stress with all reactions and its speed and agility increase by +2 CAT. Takes 1 slash on its talisman at the end of any round in a conflict scene where it's not standing on a road, eventually disintegrating.

name: Twin
description: May often be mistaken for a homeless person or vagrant when not active. Skin looks like old rags made of flesh. Passive when undisturbed. The lesser twin is fused to main body and continually mumbles future tragic events.
behavior: Quiet and relatively docile if unprovoked. If bothered, attempts to pull its provoker into the cavity in its body.

specials.name: Mumble
specials.desc: Exorcists that take any action within hands reach of the Twin overhear what it is mumbling. Without ear protection, take 1 stress (ignoring reductions) at the end of their action.

name: Walker
description: 6-8m tall. Only appears in inclement weather, and fades away when weather stops. Head terminates in brachial structures. Strength capable of snapping trees and power poles.
behavior: Poor senses, easily avoided at range. Walks slowly and aimlessly in passive state. Very fast when active.

specials.name: Fade Away
specials.desc: If not in inclement weather, returns where it came from, fading away at the end of any round in a conflict scene.

name: Cracked Man
location: Abandoned places with children (Homes, Schools, Childcare)
description: Found most often in abandoned places that had a lot of children. Violent and belligerent.
behavior: Violent and extraordinarily belligerent once found. Spends long time figuring out how to open doors or windows.

specials.name: Split
specials.desc: Body part starts to split off, weeping ichor. Acts with the body part at a distance, increasing execution talisman by +2 if threat is executed upon.

name: Neighbor
description: Free-floating entity appearing in numbers during mass casualty events. Vultures of the psychic sea. Observers report seeing a badly mutilated version of their own body floating in front of them.
behavior: Capable of flight. Drifts at a distance for some time. Mostly curious.

specials.name: Intangible
specials.desc: Takes -1 slash from physical harm (weapons, physical objects).

specials.name: Deathmask
specials.desc: Deals +2 stress with reactions to exorcists that already have an injury (they see their own face).

name: Dog
description: 1-1.5m at the shoulder. Quadrupedal or bipedal. Easily operates doors. Responsible for disappearances in parking lots.

specials.name: The Bends
specials.desc: Inflict with stress or threat. Exorcist finds it increasingly difficult to walk with a bipedal gait. Feet and limbs distort becoming digitigrade if untreated.

name: Worm Body
description: Mistaken for a tall person at a distance. Observed in neglected residential properties. Entire entity made up of writhing, splitting worms.
behavior: Attracted to breathing creatures, following exhalations.

specials.name: Worm Hook
specials.desc: A worm burrows into body. Recovers -1 stress from resting dice for each tick. If full, roll 1d6: (1-3) instant death, (4-6) clear slashes and infect another exorcist.
